race.comment: I CAN HELP (1) returned in fine fashion with a dominant win over this track and trip and will have derived a stack of confidence from that victory. Winning rider Tilley sticks in the irons and can go back-to-back to start the campaign. SHAHAR (8) resumes here but showed enough when last in work to warrant serious consideration in a race of this nature. Include with the claim. JEANS (2) saves his best form for this sprint journey with a win and three placings from five attempts. Top-three candidate. LADY WILLPOWER (11) is having her first run for the new stable and any market confidence must be noted. TASSORTIUM (10) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be underestimated.
